name: model-agnostic-workflow-system-tool-catalog

tools.name: analyze-content-semantics-for-design
tools.purpose: Analyze bounded content semantics and emit a normalized design-semantic profile with deterministic evidence.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Path to plain-text or JSON payload with content signals.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Inline content to analyze when no input path is provided.

outputs.name: semanticProfile
outputs.description: Normalized semantic profile and evidence payload.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero on missing/invalid input payload.

tools.name: analyze-skill-tree-coverage
tools.purpose: Classify skills by capability family and report weak coverage or overconcentration areas using deterministic keyword rules.

inputs.name: overconcentration_ratio
inputs.description: Family ratio threshold for overconcentration detection.

outputs.name: coverageReport
outputs.description: Family counts, weak coverage flags, and advisory expansion priorities.

tools.failureBehavior: Returns zero with advisory findings; this analysis does not assert taxonomy certainty.

tools.name: approval-gated-write-executor
tools.purpose: Perform an approved write operation only after an explicit gate has been satisfied.

outputs.name: receipt
outputs.description: Write receipt with resolved path and byte count.

tools.failureBehavior: Refuse to write if approval is missing or the path escapes the repo root.

tools.name: assert-layout-contract-rendered
tools.purpose: Check whether declared semantic layout contract posture is materially reflected in rendered metrics.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Combined payload with contract and snapshots.

inputs.name: contract
inputs.description: Contract payload path when using split inputs.

inputs.name: snapshots
inputs.description: Snapshot report path when using split inputs.

outputs.name: contractRenderAssertionReport
outputs.description: Machine-checkable assertion outcomes with pass/fail/not-assessed states.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when confirmed contract-to-render contradictions are detected.

tools.name: check-render-a11y-runtime
tools.purpose: Verify pinned render/accessibility runtime dependencies before blocking certification evals.

outputs.name: runtimeReport
outputs.description: Runtime readiness checks with fail-closed diagnostics.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when required runtime dependencies are unavailable.

tools.name: compare-render-breakpoints
tools.purpose: Detect responsive contradictions and major regressions across rendered breakpoints.

outputs.name: breakpointComparisonReport
outputs.description: Per-case breakpoint check matrix and bounded findings.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when confirmed responsive regressions are detected in blocking mode.

tools.name: deploy-readiness-gate
tools.purpose: Check whether a change is ready for guarded live deployment or release promotion.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: Deployment context such as local, staging, or production.

outputs.name: readiness
outputs.description: Readiness verdict and blockers.

tools.failureBehavior: Return BLOCKED until required gates and validations pass.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

tools.name: derive-oklch-palette
tools.purpose: Derive bounded role-based OKLCH palette recommendations from semantic profile or visual-direction contract signals.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Path to semantic profile or visual-direction contract JSON.

outputs.name: oklchPalette
outputs.description: Role-based palette with intent-level guardrail checks.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero on invalid input shape.

tools.name: detect-skill-overlap
tools.purpose: Detect potential near-duplicate skills, weak sibling boundaries, naming collisions, and routing ambiguity risk using heuristic similarity checks.

outputs.name: overlapReport
outputs.description: Heuristic overlap findings with severity and evidence.

tools.failureBehavior: Returns non-zero when high-severity overlap findings are present.

tools.name: env-secret-validator
tools.purpose: Verify required runtime environment variables are present and not obvious placeholders.

outputs.name: validation
outputs.description: Per-variable presence and placeholder status.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when required variables are missing or unsafe.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

tools.name: eval-semantic-layout-decisions
tools.purpose: Evaluate semantic-to-layout decisions for consistency, boundedness, over-stylization prevention, and proportion-rule constraints.

inputs.name: fixture
inputs.description: Path to semantic layout fixture JSON.

outputs.name: evalResult
outputs.description: Case-level pass/fail report with deterministic evidence.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when any blocking semantic-layout case fails.

tools.name: generate-visual-direction-contract
tools.purpose: Derive a bounded machine-readable visual-direction contract from a normalized semantic profile.

outputs.name: visualDirectionContract
outputs.description: Bounded visual-direction contract and derivation evidence.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero on invalid semantic profile schema.

tools.name: git-diff-explainer
tools.purpose: Summarize a git diff in operator language with file-level change signals.

outputs.name: diffSummary
outputs.description: Changed files and diff stats.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero if git is unavailable.

tools.name: issue-to-task-sync
tools.purpose: Convert issues or notes into task packets with scope, ownership, and acceptance criteria.

outputs.name: taskPacket
outputs.description: Task packet ready for implementation.

tools.failureBehavior: Return a conservative packet when issue detail is incomplete.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; use planning skills to finalize the packet

tools.name: lint-semantic-design-contracts
tools.purpose: Validate semantic design contracts for required fields, bounded enums, guardrails, and contradictions.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Path to contract JSON (object or array).

outputs.name: lintReport
outputs.description: Actionable findings with severity, code, path, and suggested fix.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when lint errors are present.

tools.name: lint-skill-contracts
tools.purpose: Validate skill files against required contract sections and frontmatter, with warning-level guidance for boundary clarity.

inputs.name: strict_core_warnings
inputs.description: Treat core warning checks as errors.

outputs.name: lintReport
outputs.description: Per-file contract findings with error/warning severity.

tools.failureBehavior: Returns non-zero when contract errors are detected.

tools.name: lint-wcag-structure
tools.purpose: Run bounded structural WCAG-oriented lint checks alongside scanner evidence.

outputs.name: wcagStructureLintReport
outputs.description: Actionable structure findings and bounded risk statuses.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when confirmed structural accessibility issues are present in blocking mode.

tools.name: log-journal-query
tools.purpose: Query logs, journals, and prior runs for prior decisions and learned constraints.

outputs.name: matches
outputs.description: Relevant log and journal excerpts.

tools.failureBehavior: Return no matches instead of guessing if evidence is absent.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

tools.name: patch-applicator-with-review-gate
tools.purpose: Alias of approval-gated-write-executor. Apply a patch only after an explicit review gate has been satisfied.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: New file content or patch payload.

outputs.name: writeReceipt
outputs.description: Write confirmation with resolved target path.

tools.failureBehavior: Refuse writes when approval is missing or the target escapes the repo root.

tools.name: pr-review-assembler
tools.purpose: Assemble a PR review payload from diff, tests, risks, and follow-up items.

outputs.name: review
outputs.description: Operator-grade review assembly.

tools.failureBehavior: Return a structured review stub if the diff is incomplete.
tools.exampleInvocation: Use $post-implementation-review-writer to synthesize the PR review.

tools.name: premerge-gate-runner
tools.purpose: Run deterministic premerge gates for package and repo changes.

outputs.name: gateResult
outputs.description: PASS/FAIL gate summary.

tools.failureBehavior: Return non-zero if validation or diff checks fail.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

tools.name: regression-comparator
tools.purpose: Compare two artifacts, diffs, or outputs and summarize regressions.

outputs.name: comparison
outputs.description: Regression summary and deltas.

tools.failureBehavior: Stub out if the two artifacts cannot be parsed consistently.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; use diff and validation scripts as needed

tools.name: render-page-snapshots
tools.purpose: Capture deterministic rendered evidence across breakpoints with screenshot artifacts and DOM/layout metrics.

outputs.name: snapshotReport
outputs.description: Per-breakpoint rendered metrics and reproducibility evidence.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when deterministic rendering or runtime checks fail.

tools.name: repo-structure-scanner
tools.purpose: Scan a repository and summarize canonical docs, entrypoints, and high-risk surfaces.

outputs.name: inventory
outputs.description: Directory, file, and skill inventory.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero on missing paths or parse errors.

tools.name: run-axe-accessibility-audit
tools.purpose: Run deterministic Axe accessibility scans for fixture or evidence pages.

outputs.name: axeAuditReport
outputs.description: Normalized Axe violations and bounded finding statuses.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when runtime checks fail or confirmed accessibility issues are detected in blocking mode.

tools.name: run-lighthouse-page-audit
tools.purpose: Run normalized Lighthouse page audits for accessibility and quality evidence.

outputs.name: lighthouseAuditReport
outputs.description: Normalized category scores and selected audit outputs.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero when runtime checks fail or blocking thresholds are violated.

tools.name: spec-compliance-checker
tools.purpose: Check a file or artifact against required headings, phrases, or markers.

outputs.name: compliance
outputs.description: Pass/fail report with missing markers.

tools.failureBehavior: Fail closed when the file is unreadable or missing required markers.

tools.name: staging-prod-context-switcher
tools.purpose: Switch operator context between staging and production assumptions without changing code.

outputs.name: contextProfile
outputs.description: Context assumptions and safety notes.

tools.failureBehavior: Refuse to infer production state without explicit evidence.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; use readiness checks and environment validation first

tools.name: structured-plan-generator
tools.purpose: Turn a broad request into bounded implementation waves and gates.

outputs.name: plan
outputs.description: Wave-based implementation plan.

tools.failureBehavior: Return a structured plan or a blocker list; never invent unknown repo facts.
tools.exampleInvocation: Use $planning-slice-builder to split the request into waves.

tools.name: symbol-dependency-tracer
tools.purpose: Trace a symbol or contract through the repository to show dependency boundaries.

outputs.name: trace
outputs.description: Trace report.

tools.failureBehavior: Return a contract-level stub if deep analysis is unavailable.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; use repo search plus local analysis scripts

tools.name: tool-namespace-loader
tools.purpose: Load and list the supported tool namespace and available tool contracts.

outputs.name: namespace
outputs.description: List of available tools and statuses.

tools.failureBehavior: Exit non-zero if the catalog is missing or malformed.
tools.exampleInvocation: contract-only; no runnable implementation is present in scripts/tools

statusLegend.runnable: implemented executable surface with an entrypoint
statusLegend.validator-backed: runnable executable whose primary role is enforcement or validation
statusLegend.helper-only: real executable used for maintenance, inventory, or analysis; not user-facing
statusLegend.contract-only: contract declaration; non-runnable in this repository
statusLegend.stub: placeholder declaration; non-runnable in this repository
statusLegend.planned: future surface explicitly named but not implemented yet

runnablePolicy: Treat a tool as runnable only when implementationStatus is runnable and entrypoint is present. Treat validator-backed and helper-only as real executable surfaces, but not necessarily user-facing tools. Contract-only, stub, and planned entries are non-runnable by definition.
